content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "NIFTY -0.55%, Bank Nifty -0.79%, India VIX +3.25% to 17.16 — broad market is risk-off but pockets of strength are extreme: SRF +10.7%, Polycab +9.5%, Pidilite +8.3%, Coforge +14%, Lupin printed an 88% YoY PAT beat. Existing book is +1.52% on the day with multiple winners now needing trail-SL discipline rather than fresh stacking. Bias is to manage existing winners aggressively, take 1-2 highest-conviction admits where catalyst is fresh and confirmed, skip the rest.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "new_target": 1115.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10% unrealized, breakout to fresh 1080 high. Existing SL 1054.58 is ~2.3% below CMP 1082.50 — already tight enough. Tiny adjust to 1058 (2.3% gap maintained) and lift target to 1115 to capture continuation. Prior trail-gap discipline: SL must sit ≥1% below LTP — 1058 is 2.3% below, safe. Q4 strong (PAT +19.2%, GNPA 0.93% best-in-class), AAA upgrade catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold position -0.7%, SL 121 holds (~2.6% below CMP). VIX rising +3.25%, supportive of holding gold ballast. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5050.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.8% unrealized, CMP 4794.70 vs SL 4725.56 = 1.45% gap — at the edge of the 1% trail-gap floor but acceptable. Keeping SL unchanged (no-op tightening avoided) and lifting target to 5050 given Q4 board meet May 14 catalyst, BUT — Rule 11 binary-event discipline: Q4 results in 4 trading sessions (just outside 3-session window). Will reassess at next tick whether to trim ahead of May 14. Holding at full size for now; if the May 14 window enters 3 sessions, will trim to ≤5% or tighten SL aggressively."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% unrealized, CMP 7030 vs SL 6960 = 1.0% gap — exactly at the trail-gap floor. NOT tightening further as that would violate Rule 14(c) (1% min gap). Q4 already delivered (PAT +124% YoY, no further binary). Holding. No-op MODIFY avoided — leaving SL/target untouched per Rule 14 hygiene."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% unrealized, SL 836 only ~0.6% below CMP 842 — already too tight per Rule 14(c) (need 1% gap). Cannot tighten further; cannot loosen. Q4 board meet May 2026 (date TBA) is a binary risk to monitor. Leave alone, watch for the Q4 date announcement to apply Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% unrealized, SL 365 is 0.4% below CMP 366.30. Q4 already printed (PAT +30.6%, no further binary). Letting the SL do its job per Rule 17 — pre-SL exit discipline. If 365 hits, it hits; chart at ATH with strong Q4 print, recovery option intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3% unrealized at breakeven SL (820). Q4 already done (rev +22%, UVG +9%). Cannot tighten SL above entry without violating 1% trail-gap rule (CMP 828.80 vs SL 820 = 1.07%, on the floor). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1310.46,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.2% unrealized, biggest winner. CMP 1333.30 vs SL 1310.46 = 1.7% gap — within trail-gap floor. NOT tightening further (would violate 1% gap as the next move could compress quickly). Lifting target only to 1420 given brokerage TPs Rs 1690-2100 and Q4 PAT +134% YoY. Lock in the 6%+ gain via SL holding firm at 1310."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3% unrealized, SL at entry 3025. CMP 3069.70 vs SL 3025 = 1.46% gap, on the floor. Defense PSU at extended levels post 49% April rally — risk of profit booking. HOLDing at breakeven SL; will tighten only after a material move higher."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 821.88,
      "new_target": 880.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.7% unrealized. CMP 834.15 vs SL 821.88 = 1.47% gap — on the trail-gap floor. NOT tightening SL further. Lifting target to 880 given Nuvama TP Rs 910 and Q4 print. Already +20% in a month, near-term overbought — discipline says don't chase."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, Q4 just printed yesterday (PAT +36.6%, UVG 15.3% best-in-class). SL 1445 is ~2.2% below CMP 1477.70 — appropriate. Letting thesis play out per Rule 17. No new info post-entry justifying exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9% unrealized but Q4 results released yesterday were a MASSIVE beat: PAT +88% YoY, EBITDA margin 33.6% (best-in-class), US +46%. Earnings call TODAY 16:00 IST is a residual binary but post-print direction is positive. SL 2395 is 2.2% below CMP 2419.80 — appropriate. Concall could drive material upside on FY27 guidance. Holding through; 'sell-the-news' wobble is normal post-print noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+9.55% to ATH Rs 9133, Citi TP 10,500 = ~15% upside. Genuinely strong Q4 (rev +28.9%, market share 30-31%) but stock is +6% gap-up, intraday extended. PAT growth (+6.34%) materially below revenue (+27%) signals margin pressure. Chasing breakout-to-ATH on a -0.55% Nifty day is poor R:R. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "FINCABLES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meet May 10 = 2 trading sessions away. Rule 11 binary-event discipline: NO new entry inside 3-session binary window unless event-trade sized ≤5% with conf ≥0.70. Setup is volume-driven (4.1x) but Q3 EPS missed. Pass per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (FY26 PAT +46.7%) but stock +10.7% to 2793 — extreme single-day move, NIL final dividend disappointed, ME export disruption flagged. Chasing a +10% ATH-adjacent print on a risk-off Nifty day is the wrong trade. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Already held — adding-on rule N/A. Skipping per single-position size discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATATECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Highest market volume surge (12.8x) with only +1.16% price — could be accumulation OR distribution. No supplementary research provided in this batch to determine catalyst direction. Without catalyst clarity, the volume signal is ambiguous. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GABRIEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Auto components +5.85%. No supplementary research provided to validate catalyst. Auto sector binary event calendar is dense (Hyundai earnings today). Without research depth, pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+5.28% with 11.8x volume but no supplementary research. Wockhardt has had governance/regulatory history (Rule 13). Without explicit research clearance on ASM/regulatory status, pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pharma +5.15%, no detailed research provided. Lupin already covers pharma exposure in book at high conviction. Pass to avoid pharma cluster stack (Rule 10)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "KPIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Construction/infra +2.82%. No supplementary research. Capital Goods cluster already heavy in book (HAL, TITAGARH, GRSE = 3 names). Rule 10 hard limit: max 1 new in cluster where I already hold names. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+8.17% on auto+defense narrative. No research provided. Pass without research depth."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RAMCOCEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Cement/infra +4.64%, no research. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in ~7.5% gain floor while leaving 2.3% room above SL"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ballast, VIX rising"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "May 14 Q4 board meet — will reassess for trim/tighten when in 3-session window"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at trail-gap floor, Q4 done, let it run"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 836 already too tight to trail further; respect floor"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Let SL do its job per Rule 17 pre-SL discipline"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry already at 1% trail-gap floor"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Biggest winner, SL 1310 locking in 4% gain, target lifted to 1420"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven SL appropriate post 49% April rally"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor, target lifted"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 just printed +36.6%, normal post-print noise, SL 1445 protects"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 was massive beat (+88% PAT), concall today 16:00 may add upside, SL 2395 appropriate"
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "POLYCAB/SRF/PIDILITIND-extension/COFORGE-extension/CAMS-extension all extended on the day — chase risk too high on a -0.55% Nifty day. FINCABLES blocked by 2-session binary (May 10 Q4). TATATECH volume surge worth watching tomorrow once direction confirms. WOCKPHARMA needs regulatory due diligence before any entry (Rule 13). Capital Goods cluster (HAL/TITAGARH/GRSE) already at limit per Rule 10 — no further admits there.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +1.52% today with 12 holdings, 58% deployed, ~42% cash. Today's pattern is aggressive winner-management: 5 MODIFY (PNBHOUSING/HAL/NAVINFLUOR/COFORGE/CAMS) trailing SLs and lifting targets on confirmed momentum, 7 HOLDs where SL is already at the 1% trail-gap floor and cannot tighten further. Zero new admits this tick is justified by: (a) every viable candidate is gap-up extended on a risk-off Nifty day, (b) FINCABLES blocked by Rule 11 binary, (c) Capital Goods/Pharma/BFSI/Chem clusters all at single-cluster admit limit. Will revisit afternoon ticks if any candidate consolidates back near support. Cumulative experiment P&L now +₹12,288 (+1.23%) — book is finally productive after the rough first two weeks. Rule 17 discipline (no panic pre-SL closes) and Rule 14 trail-gap (no SL flush with CMP) are doing their job; Day-12's failure mode of 5 preemptive exits is being actively avoided."
}
